evals.prompt: Use clawteam to launch a software development team to build a REST API with auth
evals.expected_output: clawteam launch command with software-dev template and goal argument
assertions: Response includes pip install clawteam
Response shows clawteam launch software-dev --goal '...'
Response mentions tmux requirement
Response explains the 6 agents in the software-dev template

evals.prompt: How do I spawn multiple Claude Code agents working on different tasks in the same repo?
evals.expected_output: Manual team setup: spawn-team, task create, spawn tmux claude for each agent, board live
assertions: Response shows clawteam team spawn-team command
Response shows clawteam task create with -o owner flag
Response shows clawteam spawn tmux claude --team ... --agent-name ...
Response shows clawteam board live or board attach for monitoring

evals.prompt: How do agents communicate with each other in clawteam?
evals.expected_output: Inbox system: clawteam inbox send, broadcast, receive, watch with --exec
assertions: Response explains inbox send for direct messaging
Response explains inbox broadcast for all-agent messages
Response mentions inbox watch --exec for reactive automation
Response clarifies messages are stored as JSON files in ~/.clawteam/teams/{team}/inboxes/

evals.prompt: I want each agent to work on its own git branch to avoid conflicts
evals.expected_output: workspace isolation via --workspace flag and workspace commands
assertions: Response mentions --workspace flag in clawteam spawn
Response shows clawteam workspace checkpoint for committing
Response shows clawteam workspace merge to integrate changes
Response explains each agent gets its own git worktree branch

evals.prompt: How do I monitor the real-time progress of my clawteam agents?
evals.expected_output: board commands: show, live, attach, serve with HTTP/SSE API
assertions: Response covers clawteam board live for auto-refresh kanban
Response covers clawteam board attach for tmux tile view
Response mentions clawteam board serve for web dashboard
Response mentions /api/events/{team} SSE endpoint for real-time push
